name: Standard Meeting Notes
description: A professional general-purpose template with a clear TL;DR, decisions, owners, and next steps.

sections.title: TL;DR
sections.instruction: Write a concise 2-4 bullet executive summary covering the most important outcomes, risks, or follow-ups from the meeting.

sections.title: Key Decisions
sections.instruction: List the final decisions that were actually made. Use one bullet per decision and avoid tentative discussion points.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: List the follow-up tasks agreed in the meeting. Every item must include an owner if one was mentioned, the task, and due date or timing if available.

sections.title: Discussion Topics
sections.instruction: Summarize the major topics discussed, the context behind them, and any notable tradeoffs or open questions raised.

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.instruction: Capture the immediate next milestones, check-ins, or dependencies that should happen after this meeting.
